div.div:
Build Process (make prep && make):
1. docker pull — retrieves Copilot container with Haskell + GCC
2. runhaskell Main.hs — Copilot DSL generates C99 monitor code
3. gcc — compiles monitor + generated C into native binary
Launch (make run):
• Starts tmux with 4 panes inside the Docker container
• All communication via localhost UDP + shared syslog file
• Monitor reads syslog, checks timing (< 500ms requirement)

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(0, 0, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.div:
Use Case: Cabin Lights (Single Device)
[Switch Sensor] →UDP→ [Cabin Lights App] →UDP→ [Light Actuator]
↓
[Syslog] ← monitored by → [Copilot Monitor]
Requirement: Light state change in < 500ms
All apps are native processes running inside Docker container.
